response.justification: The candidate lacks substantial C++ experience relevant to industrial automation, with only a brief, early-career C++ role at National Instruments and no demonstrated work on high-performance, multi-threaded, or IEC 62443-compliant systems; their recent work is dominated by TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with no evidence of message brokers, MQTT, REST APIs in industrial contexts, or cloud platform development for automation machinery.
strengths: Strong full-stack and cross-platform development experience across web, mobile, and embedded systems.
Demonstrated leadership in open-source projects and technical education (workshops, talks, mentoring).
Extensive DevOps and CI/CD infrastructure experience with Docker, GitLab, and Kubernetes.
concerns: Minimal recent C++ exposure; core role requirements are not met with current skill focus.
No evidence of industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443-4-1), MQTT, or industrial protocols (OPC UA, Modbus).
Lacks documented experience in on-premises industrial automation platforms or scalable embedded systems design.
